display.purpose: Hero headlines and editorial moments only. Zapf Renaissance.

headline.purpose: Public section titles. Work Sans bold.

title.purpose: Card titles, admin page headers, form sections.

body.purpose: Prose, tables, forms. Work Sans 500 default. Max 65–75ch in long-form.

label.purpose: Public uppercase metadata and CTA text only. Not admin section eyebrows.

shadows.name: cta-spotlight
shadows.purpose: Public primary CTA at rest — trust spotlight, not card elevation.

components.name: Public Primary CTA
components.description: Hero and public trust actions — authenticate, verify, consign.
components.css: .ds-btn-public-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 16px 48px; background: #1C4D8D; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(28, 77, 141, 0.3); transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-public-primary:hover { background: #498BC4; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(28, 77, 141, 0.3); } .ds-btn-public-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0A0A0A, 0 0 0 4px #1C4D8D; } .ds-btn-public-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Public Primary CTA Hover
components.description: Hover state reference for public primary CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-public-primary-hover { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 16px 48px; background: #498BC4; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(28, 77, 141, 0.3); cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Admin Primary Button
components.description: Default admin action — save, invite, submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-admin-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 40px; padding: 8px 16px; background: hsl(221, 83%, 53%); color: hsl(210, 40%, 98%); font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-admin-primary:hover { background: hsl(221, 83%, 48%); } .ds-btn-admin-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px hsl(221, 83%, 53%); } .ds-btn-admin-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Admin Outline Button
components.description: Secondary admin actions — cancel, filter, view options.
components.css: .ds-btn-admin-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid hsl(214, 32%, 91%); border-radius: 0; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-admin-outline:hover { background: hsl(210, 40%, 96%); } .ds-btn-admin-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px hsl(221, 83%, 53%); }

components.name: Admin Text Input
components.description: Standard admin form field on white surface.
components.css: .ds-input-admin { display: block; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid hsl(214, 32%, 91%); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-input-admin::placeholder { color: #475569; } .ds-input-admin:hover { border-color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input-admin:focus { outline: none; border-color: hsl(221, 83%, 53%); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(28, 77, 141, 0.2); } .ds-input-admin:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Admin Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Portal sidebar navigation link — active state uses Primary Blue.
components.html: LeadsDeals
components.css: .ds-nav-admin { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 8px; background: #ffffff; border-right: 1px solid #cbd5e1; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-admin-item { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 200ms, color 200ms; } .ds-nav-admin-item:hover { background: #f0f2f7; color: #0f172a; } .ds-nav-admin-item--active { background: #1C4D8D; color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-admin-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #498BC4; }

components.name: Admin Data Card
components.description: CRM/metrics card on Stitch tonal surface.
components.css: .ds-card-admin { padding: 16px 20px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 0; } .ds-card-admin-label { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; } .ds-card-admin-value { margin: 0; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

components.name: Verification Status Chip
components.description: Authentication status — always text + color, never icon-only.
components.css: .ds-chip-verified { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #065f46; background: #d1fae5; border: 1px solid #10B981; border-radius: 0; } .ds-chip-pending { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #92400e; background: #fef3c7; border: 1px solid #F59E0B; border-radius: 0; margin-left: 8px; }

components.name: Public Metadata Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked eyebrow — use once per section max on public pages.
components.css: .ds-metadata { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.4em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #BDE8F5; }

narrative.overview:
Relique's visual system treats authenticated memorabilia like artifacts in a premium vault — dark, confident surfaces; sharp geometry; blue as the thread of trust. Public surfaces carry broadcast energy (uppercase CTAs, ice-blue accents, serif hero type); admin surfaces stay utilitarian and scannable (Stitch tonal containers, Work Sans at medium weight, data-first layouts). Depth comes from tonal layering, not decoration.

The system explicitly rejects crypto/Web3 neon, marketplace clutter, and generic SaaS landing tropes from PRODUCT.md. Trust is shown through provenance, status, and expert process — never through hype gradients or bargain-bin density.
keyCharacteristics: Dual register: brand (dark public site) vs product (light admin CRM), one navy/blue identity
0px radius on brand CTAs and global --radius; admin inherits shadcn structure with sharp token base
Zapf Renaissance for display hero; Work Sans 500 as default body weight
Tonal elevation via Stitch surface-container-* steps — shadows are rare and purposeful
Uppercase tracked metadata (0.3em+) on public interactive labels only
WCAG 2.1 AA contrast floor on all body text and focus rings

rules.name: The One Blue Voice Rule
rules.body: Primary Blue appears on every interactive trust action (authenticate, verify, consign, save). Accent Blue is hover/secondary only — never the default CTA fill.

rules.name: The Dark Public Rule
rules.body: Public marketing and transactional browse surfaces default to Void Black / Locker Charcoal. Admin never uses the public dark canvas for primary workflow screens.

rules.name: The Serif Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Zapf Renaissance is for display hero and editorial moments only. Admin UI, tables, and forms use Work Sans exclusively.

rules.name: The Tracking Floor Rule
rules.body: Display hero letter-spacing never tighter than -0.04em. Metadata uppercase tracking never below 0.15em on mobile.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to primary CTA state on the public register — never as default card chrome in admin.

dos: Do use Primary Blue (#1C4D8D) for every primary trust action (authenticate, verify, consign, save listing).
Do keep admin tables and forms on Stitch tonal surfaces with clear on-surface / on-surface-variant text hierarchy.
Do use Zapf Renaissance only for hero/display; Work Sans for everything operational.
Do maintain 4.5:1 body text contrast — bump muted grays toward ink when in doubt.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: replace framer-motion hero entrance with instant or crossfade.
donts: Don't use crypto/Web3 aesthetics — neon accents, glassmorphism, speculative hype language.
Don't create marketplace clutter — eBay/Craigslist density, noisy filter walls, bargain-bin visual chaos.
Don't deploy generic SaaS landing patterns — purple gradients, hero metrics, identical card grids, eyebrow kickers on every section.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't apply uppercase tracked metadata labels to every admin section header — that's public-register grammar.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) for emphasis — solid Primary Blue or white only.
